Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First identify the issues with the current model It has Create Purchase Requisition then Approve Purchase Requisition then Parallel block of Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice Pay Invoice then Close Case The parallel block allows all these activities to happen in any order and potentially concurrently

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Specifically it allows Paying invoice before receiving goods or invoice Matching invoice before receiving invoice Creating PO after receiving goods Any interleaving

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The correct standard logic is Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Create Purchase Order Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice Close Case

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: In real Procure to Pay sometimes goods receipt and invoice receipt can happen in either order

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the corrected model is a pure sequence root equals ProcessTree with Operator SEQUENCE and children create req approve req create po receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The issues are lack of ordering constraints among the middle steps The parallel AND block allows concurrent or interleaved execution of Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice Pay Invoice in any order This violates causal dependencies

Name: Validation - PE
